title: Flutter/Android project skeleton with frb setup
description:
Create android/ Flutter project skeleton. Files-only; flutter build validation deferred until NDK installed.

What: The android/ directory is a Flutter app using flutter_rust_bridge to call into flutter-bridge/ Rust crate.

Algorithm:
1. Create android/pubspec.yaml (flutter_rust_bridge: ^2.0, dependency on frb codegen)
2. Create android/android/app/build.gradle (NDK abiFilters, min SDK 26)
3. Create android/android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml
4. Create android/lib/main.dart (entry point, MaterialApp scaffold)
5. Create android/lib/screens/chat_screen.dart (placeholder)
6. Create android/lib/screens/identity_screen.dart (placeholder)
7. Create android/rust/Cargo.toml linking to flutter-bridge crate
8. Create android/.fvmrc pinning Flutter stable 3.41.4

Acceptance: All files created; fvm flutter pub get succeeds (no Dart analysis errors on pubspec).
acceptance_criteria: All scaffold files created; pubspec.yaml is valid YAML with flutter_rust_bridge dependency
close_reason: Flutter 3.41.4 project created; frb dep added; flutter pub get + analyze clean
